%actionAddMail all
 dad1 Now%%
%actionAddMail all
 HasTownKey 
Received%%
%AddBuff 22 -2%%
%actionAddMail all
 OpenedSewer 
Received%%
%action
AddFriendshipPoi${
¦}$nts Krobus 2500
%%%action
IncrementStat Bo${
¦}$ok_Speed%%
%action
IncrementStat Bo${
¦}$ok_Speed2%%
%action
AddBuff statue_of${
¦}$_blessings_0 -2
%%%action
AddMoney 4500%%
%action
MarkEventSeen all
